query:
-- CMD-202603-0001 : Market Spas Palmones (ES) → 0% TVA
-- totalHT = 2350.00, totalVAT = 0, totalTTC = 2350.00
-- depositAmount = 30% de 2350 = 705.00, balanceAmount = 1645.00
UPDATE orders SET 
  totalVAT = '0.00',
  totalTTC = '2350.00',
  depositAmount = '705.00',
  balanceAmount = '1645.00'
WHERE orderNumber = 'CMD-202603-0001';

-- CMD-TEST-001 : Fab'Elec (FR) → 20% TVA
-- totalHT = 4525.00, totalVAT = 4525 * 0.20 = 905.00, totalTTC = 5430.00
-- depositAmount = 30% de 5430 = 1629.00, balanceAmount = 3801.00
UPDATE orders SET 
  totalVAT = '905.00',
  totalTTC = '5430.00',
  depositAmount = '1629.00',
  balanceAmount = '3801.00'
WHERE orderNumber = 'CMD-TEST-001';

-- CMD-TEST-002 : Projet d'eau (FR) → 20% TVA
-- totalHT = 7370.00, totalVAT = 7370 * 0.20 = 1474.00, totalTTC = 8844.00
-- depositAmount = 30% de 8844 = 2653.20, balanceAmount = 6190.80
UPDATE orders SET 
  totalVAT = '1474.00',
  totalTTC = '8844.00',
  depositAmount = '2653.20',
  balanceAmount = '6190.80'
WHERE orderNumber = 'CMD-TEST-002';
